channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Israel-US war on Iran live: fire at US embassy in Riyadh after drone strike; state department urges all Americans to leave Middle East - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Israel-US war on Iran live: fire at US embassy in Riyadh after drone strike; state department urges all Americans to leave Middle East  The Guardian
  2. Bowen: Three days in, we still have no idea where this war is heading  BBC
  3. Tuesday briefing: ‘An historic rupture’ as the Middle East crisis spreads  The Guardian
  4. Live Updates: U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran widens  PBS
  5. As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines  The New York Times

item.title: Iran Live Updates: Israel Strikes Tehran, Beirut in Widening Conflict - WSJ
item.description:
1. Iran Live Updates: Israel Strikes Tehran, Beirut in Widening Conflict  WSJ
  2. Live updates: US Gulf allies fend off attacks as Trump warns Iran of ‘big wave’ of strikes  CNN
  3. Trump Says US Will Do ‘Whatever It Takes’ in Iran Campaign  Bloomberg.com
  4. Live updates: Trump says strikes on Iran could take weeks as U.S. urges Americans to leave the region  The Washington Post
  5. U.S. Sends More Troops to the Mideast as Iran War Expands  The New York Times

item.title: Starmer at odds with Trump in biggest disagreement yet - BBC
item.description:
1. Starmer at odds with Trump in biggest disagreement yet  BBC
  2. Brushing off Trump criticism, UK's Starmer defends actions over Iran  Reuters
  3. U.K. Doesn’t Believe in ‘Regime Change from the Skies,’ Starmer Says  WSJ
  4. Starmer lets US use bases for Iran clash: UK’s military, legal quagmire  Al Jazeera
  5. Starmer’s position on Iran pleases no one, but that is because there are no good options | Rafael Behr  The Guardian

item.title: US Embassy in Saudi Arabia hit with Iranian drones as American and Israeli attacks on Iran escalate - AP News
item.description: US Embassy in Saudi Arabia hit with Iranian drones as American and Israeli attacks on Iran escalate  AP NewsView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: UAE and Qatar Urge Allies to Help Trump Find Iran Off-Ramp - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. UAE and Qatar Urge Allies to Help Trump Find Iran Off-Ramp  Bloomberg.com

  4. UAE, Qatar Push To Limit Duration Of US Military Action Against Iran  i24NEWS
  5. UAE and Qatar looking for help defending against Iranian strikes, pushing for end to war - report  The Times of Israel

item.title: IDF strike kills Hezbollah intel chief; Lebanon to ban terror group’s military activity - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. IDF strike kills Hezbollah intel chief; Lebanon to ban terror group’s military activity  The Times of Israel

  4. Lebanon’s leaders turn on Hezbollah as airstrikes hit Beirut and thousands seek shelter  AP News

item.title: We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said. - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.  The Washington Post
  2. CNN poll: 59% of Americans disapprove of Iran strikes and most think a long-term conflict is likely  CNN
  3. Opinion | How Trump's polling could impact the Iran War  MS NOW
  4. Do you support or oppose the military action that the United States has taken against Iran?  YouGov
  5. Just one in four Americans say they back US strikes on Iran, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters

item.title: Intelligence assessment warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei's death - Reuters
item.description:
1. Intelligence assessment warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei's death  Reuters

  3. Opinion | Khamenei’s Unforced Errors Proved Fatal  WSJ
  4. Hacked Traffic Cameras, Mobile Phone Networks: How Khamenei Was Tracked, Killed  NDTV
  5. A look at some of the contenders to be Iran’s supreme leader after the killing of Khamenei  AP News

item.title: Beijing Doesn’t Think Like Washington—and the Iran Conflict Shows Why - Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
item.description:
1. Beijing Doesn’t Think Like Washington—and the Iran Conflict Shows Why  Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
  2. China’s ice-cold calculus over Iran  The Economist
  3. U.S. Attacks on Iran Test Fragile Truce With China  The New York Times
  4. Attack on Iran could buoy Trump in talks with China's Xi  Reuters
  5. Trump’s show of force in the Middle East creates a weakness China can exploit  The Guardian

item.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says - Reuters
item.description:
1. About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says  Reuters

item.title: Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky as much of the Middle East joins Russia on the airspace no-fly list - Business Insider
item.description:
1. Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky as much of the Middle East joins Russia on the airspace no-fly list  Business Insider

  4. Thousands of flights cancelled as world faces worst travel chaos since Covid crisis  The Guardian
  5. Air travel chaos intensifies as airports remain closed, flights canceled amid Iran war  CBS News

item.title: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies - BBC
item.description:

item.title: India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal - BBC
item.description:

item.title: Travelers Stuck in Dubai Face ‘Chaos and Confusion’ Amid Flight Cancellations - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Travelers Stuck in Dubai Face ‘Chaos and Confusion’ Amid Flight Cancellations  The New York Times

  4. They flew to Dubai for a romantic anniversary getaway. Then the bombing started.  NBC News
  5. Missiles Over Dubai: I’m watching the influencer bubble burst in real time  The Independent

item.title: Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours  The Washington Post

  4. Dispatch from Tehran: Nowhere feels safe from attack  NBC News

item.title: Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: State Department Urges Americans to Leave Middle East Now - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. State Department Urges Americans to Leave Middle East Now  Bloomberg.com

  4. Security Alert – Shelter-in-Place (March 1, 2026)  U.S. Embassy Doha – Qatar (.gov)

item.title: World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war - PBS
item.description:
1. World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war  PBS

  4. Additional Remarks at an Emergency UN Security Council Briefing on Iran  United States Mission to the United Nations (.gov)
  5. Africa urges restraint as US-Israel strikes escalate in Iran  DW.com

item.title: Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks  CBS News
  2. No warning, no siren: Six US service members killed in Iranian strike that hit makeshift operations center in Kuwait  CNN
  3. U.S. Military Death Toll in Iran War Rises to 6  The New York Times
  4. Six Troops Killed in Kuwait in Iran Drone Attack  WSJ
  5. 6 U.S. soldiers have been killed as the war with Iran further engulfs the region  NPR
